rationale.fidelity: Preserves all dispatch decisions, known inputs, feasibility constraints, the routing-plus-lateness objective, and the five-minute cutoff.
rationale.managerial_framing: Directly connects early incumbents to the plan available at release and makes the fixed-budget operational mechanism concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No novelty or literature claim is asserted.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Separates the early-quality hypothesis from proof and specifies comparative testing and statistical assessment before superiority claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Compact and clear, with minor encoding damage but no substantive ambiguity.
rationale.overall: A nearly ideal concise framing of deadline-dependent algorithmic value and evidentiary limits.
